flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ramapo College of New Jersey rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.0k → $16.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ramapo College of New Jersey rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.7k → $27.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ramapo College of New Jersey fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ramapo College of New Jersey rose 39% between 2006 and 2009 (44.3% → 61.7%).
